summary: Comprehensive testing completed for AIBrief24 mobile app. Backend: 24/24 tests passed (100% success rate). Frontend: All core flows working correctly - onboarding, authentication, home feed, search, bookmarks, categories, settings, and tab navigation. All testID attributes present for automation. Error handling and form validation working properly.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow' instead
Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'

action_items: Consider updating shadow styles to use boxShadow instead of deprecated shadow* props (non-blocking)
Monitor bcrypt warning in backend logs (currently non-breaking)
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ All API endpoints tested and working (24/24 tests passed)
✓ JWT authentication properly implemented with password hashing
✓ All frontend screens have proper testID attributes for automation
✓ Error handling working correctly (validation messages display properly)
✓ Bookmark functionality fully integrated (add, remove, display)
✓ Tab navigation working smoothly between all 4 tabs
✓ Dark mode theme consistently applied across all screens
✓ Mobile-first design with proper spacing (24px horizontal padding)
✓ React Native components used correctly (View, Text, TouchableOpacity, etc.)
RESOLVED: Onboarding screen displays icons and text correctly (previously reported issue no longer present)
MINOR: Shadow style deprecation warnings present but non-breaking
MINOR: Backend bcrypt version warning (non-breaking, authentication still works)
seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created during testing with format test{random}@aibrief24.com and test{random}@test.com. Backend uses in-memory storage with 20 pre-seeded AI news articles across 9 categories.
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is fully functional. Backend APIs all working with 100% test pass rate. Frontend UI tested across all screens - onboarding, auth, home feed, search, bookmarks, categories, settings. All core user flows verified. Only minor console warnings present (shadow*, pointerEvents deprecations) which are non-breaking. Onboarding screen visibility issue mentioned by previous agent is no longer present - icons and text display correctly.
rca_of_issue: N/A - No critical issues found. All features working as expected. Previous onboarding visibility issue appears to have been resolved.
